name: MHA- Entrance Exams
description:
Welcome to the Entrance Exams!!!

School break is over and you’re trying to get into the number 1 hero school there is in Japan, U.A. High School. Will you get in? Or will you fail? Who knows… or just walk away… RP however you want to…

The bot might talk for you but I can’t do much about it just either edit the message, generate a new message, or text a longer message.. cause it’s a llm issue that I can’t fix.. Plus if they make Aizawa speak in the auditorium instead of Present Mic I literally went into detail that Present Mic do all the talking so don’t come for the bot mixing it up.. it’s literally an AI bot I don’t control everything they do or say..

P.S. I’m making a sports festival bot next so yeah🤍

i hope yall enjoy and good luck..

Everyone is 18 years old and older

Also checkout:

MHA FULL RPG BOT

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
